metadata.method_name: M2 — Cross-Dictionary Replication of the iter-4 auditability spine on a second Gemma-Scope SAE
metadata.description: Re-run the homograph recall-holes + KG-repair FDR survivors + Georgia/Jordan surgical edits + recall-hole/firing-Jaccard router on a SECOND Gemma-Scope SAE dictionary of the SAME frozen gemma-2-2b (PRIMARY width-65k layer-12 canonical; SECONDARY reduced layer-9 width-16k), with anchors AND absorbers RE-DERIVED per dictionary (16k latent ids do not carry over). Per-piece REPLICATES / PARTIAL / DICTIONARY-DEPENDENT verdict + honest deltas vs the 16k counts.

k_localization.conclusion: KG names exactly one addable auditable latent per sub-context; the (k) example-reweighting probe yields a dense hyperplane that does NOT localize to any single SAE latent -> no per-sub-context handle.

surgical_cases.reason: no precision>=0.70 absorber on this dictionary
surgical_cases.note: KEY dictionary-dependence outcome: wider/different SAE did not expose a clean high-precision absorber for this sub-context

surgical_cases.reason: no precision>=0.70 absorber on this dictionary
surgical_cases.note: KEY dictionary-dependence outcome: wider/different SAE did not expose a clean high-precision absorber for this sub-context

verdict.notes: Per-piece REPLICATES/PARTIAL/DICTIONARY-DEPENDENT for homograph-holes, repair-FDR, surgical edit, and router transfer on each dictionary; anchors+absorbers re-derived per dictionary. A clean non-replication is the publishable wider-SAE-absorbs-more (dictionary-dependence) finding.

member_labeling.status: skipped (core spine is $0 LLM; run with --member_labeling)

examples.input: [65k|homograph_hole|United States] does the parent recall-hole + low firing-Jaccard reappear on this dictionary?
[65k|repair_fdr|spelling] how many KG-repairs survive BH FDR<=0.05 vs 16k?
[65k|repair_fdr|homograph_taxonomic] how many KG-repairs survive BH FDR<=0.05 vs 16k?
[65k|repair_fdr|numeric] how many KG-repairs survive BH FDR<=0.05 vs 16k?
[65k|surgical|taxonomic/Georgia] KG-ABL single re-derived absorber -1; surgical edit verdict?
[65k|surgical|taxonomic/Jordan] KG-ABL single re-derived absorber -1; surgical edit verdict?
[65k|surgical|taxonomic/United States] KG-ABL single re-derived absorber 9410; surgical edit verdict?
[65k|router] do FROZEN 16k thresholds (recall-hole lead) still classify absorption vs co-firing?
[65k|OVERALL] cross-dictionary replication verdict for the auditability spine
